title: Forest of Secrets
desc: Long-held secrets burst into the open — Bluestar's hidden kits, Yellowfang's past, and Tigerclaw's betrayal. 🌲
descZh: 尘封已久的秘密一一揭开——蓝星的私生幼猫、黄牙的过去，以及虎掌的背叛。

q.en: What happens to Silverstream, and what kits are born?
q.zh: 银溪遭遇了什么？哪两只幼猫出生了？

options.en: She dies giving birth to Featherkit and Stormkit
options.zh: 她在生产羽崽和暴崽时死去

explain.en: Silverstream dies while giving birth; Graystripe brings their two half-Clan kits, Featherkit and Stormkit, to ThunderClan.
explain.zh: 银溪在生产时死去；灰条把两只混族幼猫羽崽和暴崽带回了雷族。

q.en: What terrible injury does Cinderpaw suffer that ends her warrior path?
q.zh: Cinderpaw 受了什么伤，断送了她的武士之路？

options.en: Hit by a monster (car) on the Thunderpath
options.zh: 在雷道上被怪兽（汽车）撞伤

explain.en: Cinderpaw is struck by a monster on the Thunderpath; her leg is ruined and she trains as medicine cat Cinderpelt.
explain.zh: Cinderpaw 在雷道上被怪兽撞伤，腿废了，于是转而作巫医炭毛。

q.en: Whose kits does Bluestar reveal she secretly gave birth to?
q.zh: 蓝星透露自己暗中生下的幼猫是谁？

options.en: Mistyfoot and Stonefur (with Oakheart of RiverClan)
options.zh: 雾脚和石毛（与河族橡心所生）

explain.en: Bluestar reveals her kits were fathered by Oakheart of RiverClan and grew up as Mistyfoot and Stonefur of RiverClan.
explain.zh: 蓝星透露她的幼猫是和河族橡心所生，后来作为雾脚和石毛在河族长大。

q.en: Who is Fireheart's kittypet sister whose kit became Cloudtail?
q.zh: 火星那只家猫姐姐是谁，她的孩子成了云尾？

explain.en: Princess is Fireheart's sister; she gave one of her kits to Fireheart, who brought Cloudtail into ThunderClan.
explain.zh: 公主是火星的姐姐，她把一只幼猫交给火星，也就是后来被带进雷族的云尾。

q.en: What shocking secret does Yellowfang reveal about Brokenstar?
q.zh: 黄牙关于碎星，透露了什么惊人的秘密？

options.en: She is his mother and killed him to stop his cruelty
options.zh: 她是碎星的母亲，并杀了他以制止其暴行

explain.en: Yellowfang confesses she is Brokenstar's mother and killed him to end his evil reign over ShadowClan.
explain.zh: 黄牙坦白自己是碎星的母亲，并为了结束他对影族的暴政而杀了他。

q.en: Which Clan does the traitor Tigerclaw (now Tigerstar) lead by this book?
q.zh: 叛徒虎掌（现为虎星）在本书中统领哪个族群？

explain.en: After being exiled from ThunderClan, Tigerclaw becomes Tigerstar, the leader of ShadowClan.
explain.zh: 被雷族流放后，虎掌成为虎星，当上了影族的族长。

q.en: Who kills Brokenstar, the imprisoned evil former leader?
q.zh: 谁杀死了被囚禁的邪恶前任族长碎星？

explain.en: Yellowfang kills Brokenstar in his prison to stop his plots against the Clans.
explain.zh: 黄牙在囚室里杀死了碎星，以阻止他继续危害各族。

q.en: What does Cinderpaw become after her injury?

explain.en: Unable to be a warrior, Cinderpaw trains under Yellowfang and becomes Cinderpelt, ThunderClan's medicine cat.
explain.zh: 无法成为武士的 Cinderpaw 跟随黄牙学习，成为了雷族巫医炭毛。

q.en: Why is this book called 'Forest of Secrets'?
q.zh: 为什么这本书叫《秘密森林》？

options.en: Because many hidden truths come to light (Bluestar's kits, Yellowfang's past, Tigerstar's betrayal)
options.zh: 因为许多隐藏的真相被揭开（蓝星的幼猫、黄牙的过去、虎星的背叛）

options.en: Because it is set in a secret part of the forest
options.zh: 因为它发生在森林中隐秘的一处

options.en: Because the cats hide from Twolegs
options.zh: 因为猫们在躲避两脚兽
因为有一笔隐藏的宝藏

explain.en: The book uncovers several long-buried secrets that change the fate of all four Clans.
explain.zh: 本书揭开了几桩埋藏已久的秘密，改变了四大猫族共同的命运。

q.en: What name does Tigerclaw take after leaving ThunderClan and joining ShadowClan?
q.zh: 虎掌离开雷族、加入影族后，采用了什么名号？

explain.en: He renames himself Tigerstar and becomes the leader of ShadowClan, sharpening his plan against the other Clans.
explain.zh: 他改名虎星，成为影族族长，并加紧策划对付其他族群。
